description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the pijzl/docker-node-karma-protractor-chrome Docker image and two stages: dependences and gulp. Add an install job in the dependences stage that runs npm install then bower install --allow-root, and publishes node_modules/ and bower_components/ as artifacts that expire in one week. In the gulp stage add three jobs: gulp_build runs gulp build, gulp_e2e runs gulp protractor, and gulp_test runs gulp test. All jobs execute the before_script commands npm -v, node -v, pwd, and ls -l before their own script.
